'''鈭歾-ng-d''' ('''zangada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backsight|backsight]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ng-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backsight|backsight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-ng-d
|-
! Lemma
| zangada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zangadithi|zangadithi]] || [[word:zangadiji|zangadiji]] || [[word:zangadishi|zangadishi]] || [[word:zangadi|zangadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zangaduthuth|zangaduthuth]] || [[word:zangadujuj|zangadujuj]] || [[word:zangadushush|zangadushush]] || [[word:zangad|zangad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zangaduthu|zangaduthu]] || [[word:zangaduju|zangaduju]] || [[word:zangadushu|zangadushu]] || [[word:zangadu|zangadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zangadufuth|zangadufuth]] || [[word:zangadufuj|zangadufuj]] || [[word:zangadufush|zangadufush]] || [[word:zangaduf|zangaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zangadethe|zangadethe]] || [[word:zangadeje|zangadeje]] || [[word:zangadeshe|zangadeshe]] || [[word:zangade|zangade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zangadothoth|zangadothoth]] || [[word:zangadojoj|zangadojoj]] || [[word:zangadoshosh|zangadoshosh]] || [[word:zangad|zangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zangadotho|zangadotho]] || [[word:zangadojo|zangadojo]] || [[word:zangadosho|zangadosho]] || [[word:zangado|zangado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zangadofoth|zangadofoth]] || [[word:zangadofoj|zangadofoj]] || [[word:zangadofosh|zangadofosh]] || [[word:zangadof|zangadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zangad忙th忙|zangad忙th忙]] || [[word:zangad忙j忙|zangad忙j忙]] || [[word:zangad忙sh忙|zangad忙sh忙]] || [[word:zangad忙|zangad忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zangadathath|zangadathath]] || [[word:zangadajaj|zangadajaj]] || [[word:zangadashash|zangadashash]] || [[word:zangad|zangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zangadatha|zangadatha]] || [[word:zangadaja|zangadaja]] || [[word:zangadasha|zangadasha]] || [[word:zangada|zangada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zangadafath|zangadafath]] || [[word:zangadafaj|zangadafaj]] || [[word:zangadafash|zangadafash]] || [[word:zangadaf|zangadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zangadasha|zangadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozangadasha|gozangadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizangadasha|gokizangadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zangadn眉sha|zangadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozangadnkn眉sha|gozangadnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizangadn眉sha|gokizangadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zangadsh毛sha|zangadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozangadnksh毛sha|gozangadnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizangadsh毛sha|gokizangadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zangadrosha|zangadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozangadnkrosha|gozangadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizangadrosha|gokizangadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zangadmusha|zangadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozangadnkmusha|gozangadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizangadmusha|gokizangadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zangadsherasha|zangadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozangadnksherasha|gozangadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizangadsherasha|gokizangadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zangadngasha|zangadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozangadnkngasha|gozangadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizangadngasha|gokizangadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zangadyasha|zangadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozangadnkyasha|gozangadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizangadyasha|gokizangadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zangadyamasha|zangadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozangadnkyamasha|gozangadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizangadyamasha|gokizangadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zangadn眉sh毛sha|zangadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozangadnkn眉sh毛sha|gozangadnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizangadn眉sh毛sha|gokizangadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zangadn眉rosha|zangadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozangadnkn眉rosha|gozangadnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizangadn眉rosha|gokizangadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zangadn眉musha|zangadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozangadnkn眉musha|gozangadnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizangadn眉musha|gokizangadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zangadsh毛n眉sha|zangadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozangadnksh毛n眉sha|gozangadnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizangadsh毛n眉sha|gokizangadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zangadsh毛rosha|zangadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozangadnksh毛rosha|gozangadnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizangadsh毛rosha|gokizangadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zangadsh毛musha|zangadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozangadnksh毛musha|gozangadnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizangadsh毛musha|gokizangadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zangadron眉sha|zangadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozangadnkron眉sha|gozangadnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizangadron眉sha|gokizangadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zangadrosh毛sha|zangadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozangadnkrosh毛sha|gozangadnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizangadrosh毛sha|gokizangadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zangadromusha|zangadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozangadnkromusha|gozangadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizangadromusha|gokizangadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zangadmun眉sha|zangadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozangadnkmun眉sha|gozangadnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizangadmun眉sha|gokizangadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zangadmush毛sha|zangadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozangadnkmush毛sha|gozangadnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizangadmush毛sha|gokizangadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zangadmurosha|zangadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozangadnkmurosha|gozangadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizangadmurosha|gokizangadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zangad|zangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:z忙ng忙d|z忙ng忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozangad|hozangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoz忙ng忙d|hoz忙ng忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozangad|hohozangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoz忙ng忙d|hohoz忙ng忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zangad|n眉zangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉z忙ng忙d|n眉z忙ng忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zangad|n眉n眉zangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉z忙ng忙d|n眉n眉z忙ng忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zangad|n茂zangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂z忙ng忙d|n茂z忙ng忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zangad|n茂n茂zangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂z忙ng忙d|n茂n茂z忙ng忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzangad|luzangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luz忙ng忙d|luz忙ng忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzangad|luluzangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluz忙ng忙d|luluz忙ng忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizangad|lizangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liz忙ng忙d|liz忙ng忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizangad|lilizangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliz忙ng忙d|liliz忙ng忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozangad|kozangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koz忙ng忙d|koz忙ng忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozangad|kokozangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoz忙ng忙d|kokoz忙ng忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezangad|kezangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kez忙ng忙d|kez忙ng忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezangad|kekezangad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekez忙ng忙d|kekez忙ng忙d]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
